svg.title: Godot Control MCP phase dependencies and interface handoffs
svg.desc: Competitive research and the master architecture feed Phase 1. Phase 1 feeds the Phase 2 spine and Phases 3 through 7. Phases 3 through 6 form a parallel work row. Phase 2 is a completed coordination milestone for Phase 4 and Phase 6. Phases 1 through 6 converge on Phase 7, which feeds Phase 8.

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PHASE-00-RESEARCH
Competitive research
adopt + avoid guardrails

div.style: display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
PHASE-00-MASTER
Master architecture
standards + phase plan

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-01 · Foundation + transport
JsonRpcClient.call · registerTool
godot_compat.gd

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-02 · Introspection + universal primitive
TypeParser · IntrospectionService
execution contract + guard

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-03 · 23 curated tools
shared FIFO lane · EditController + UndoRedo

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-04 · Code intelligence
LSP client + document synchronization

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-05 · Runtime + debug · implemented
ProcessRunner · attach-only DAP · authenticated runtime bridge

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-06 · Batch + filesystem + assets
HeadlessRunner · FsGuard · UID/export

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-07 · Cross-cutting hardening
SafetyPolicy · RequestQueue · Cache
Health · AuditLog

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
PHASE-08 · Productionize + ship
resources · prompts · packaging · eval · release
